title: anthospermum rigidum subsp. rigidum
intro: Anthospermum rigidum subsp. rigidum, commonly known as the hard anthospermum or hard yellow buttons, is a flowering plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and soothing skin irritations. Anthospermum rigidum subsp. rigidum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
